error_signature: The param ‘redirect_uri’ has an invalid value.
title: Invalid redirect_uri for Pushbullet OAuth
symptom: When attempting to grant access in Pushbullet, the error 'The param ‘redirect_uri’ has an invalid value.' is displayed.
applies_when: Configured n8n with a custom domain
not_this_if: Using default callback URL without modifications
root_cause: The redirect URI must match the one configured in the OAuth client settings. If n8n is running in a Docker container with a reverse proxy, the callback URL must be set to the public domain, and the environment variable WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL must be configured accordingly.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL to your domain (e.g., export WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL=https://n8n.mydomain.tld/)
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes.
Update the redirect URI in the Pushbullet settings to match the public domain.
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL environment variable and restart the n8n container.
